basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Raebareli Registrar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) has released the Registrar Notification 2026 on 02 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Registrar position. Candidates within the age range of up to 56 years and holding a Graduate degree from a recognized University with seven years of administrative experience in a supervisory capacity or as a teacher in a University/teaching institution are eligible to apply offline through the official website. The application process will be active up to 17 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and ap

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from recognized University, Seven years experience of administration in a supervisory capacity or as a teacher in a University/teaching Institution
qualification.details: A graduate of recognized University with Seven years' experience of administration in a supervisory capacity or as a teacher in a University/teaching Institution including conduct of examination and admission and assignment of teaching programmes for under graduate and postgraduate etc. Desirable: Experience of working in Medical Institution.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimsrbl.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Raebareli Registrar post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Registrar post at AIIMS Raebareli is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Registrar position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates from a recognized university with at least seven years of administrative experience in a supervisory capacity or as a teacher in a university or teaching institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Registrar post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Registrar post is 56 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Registrar role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 78800 - 209200 per month, corresponding to Level-12.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Registrar post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Registrar post will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the AIIMS Raebareli Registrar recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is AIIMS/RBL/REC/NF/DEP/0245.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Raebareli, which is www.aiimsrbl.edu.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section.
